mcqs.question: What are significant dates or periods of leadership in Paraguayan history?
mcqs.answer: Significant dates or periods of leadership in Paraguayan history include the War of the Triple Alliance (1864-1870), the leadership of José Gaspar Rodríguez de Francia (1814-1840), and the presidency of Alfredo Stroessner (1954-1989).
distractors: The presidency of Carlos Antonio López (1841-1862)
